name: Disruptor
description: By stormcraft, I shall lay my enemies low.

15.right: +15% Glimpse Distance to Damage +300 Glimpse Max Damage

20.right: +1s Kinetic Field Duration +1s Kinetic Fence Duration

25.left: +6 Thunder Strike Strikes x0.5 Thunder Strike Strike Interval

abilities.name: Electromagnetic Repulsion
abilities.description: Damages and knocks all enemy units back within the radius, whenever the Stormcrafter accumulates a certain amount of damage taken. Effect Radius: 400. Damage Threshold: 250. Knock Distance: 400. Int to Damage: 1.5. Knock Duration: 0.2. Damage Timer: 7. Cooldown: 5.

abilities.name: Thunder Strike
abilities.description: Disruptor's charged coils occasionally overload, and a singed armor plate or tuft of fur is the enemy's result. Cast Range: 800. Strike Radius: 260. Number of Strikes: 4 (10). Damage per Strike: 25/55/85/115. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Attack Speed Slow: 100. Cooldown: 18/15/12/9. Mana Cost: 125/130/135/140.

abilities.name: Glimpse
abilities.description: Teleports the target hero back to where it was a few seconds ago. Deals damage to the affected enemy hero corresponding to its teleported distance as soon as it appears at the marked location. Cast Range: 600/1000/1400/1800. Lapsed Time: 4. Max Teleport Time: 1.8. Max Silence Duration: 1.8. Min Distance to Damage: 0. Max Distance to Damage: 1400. Cooldown: 24/22/20/18 (0). Mana Cost: 70/85/100/115.

abilities.name: Kinetic Field
abilities.description: After a short formation time, creates a circular barrier of kinetic energy that manipulates affected enemy's movement speed to point where they cannot pass. Cast Range: 900. Barrier Radius: 350. Aura Width: 70. Aura Radius: 420. Damage per Second: 0. Duration: 2.6/3.2/3.8/4.4 (3.6/4.2/4.8/5.4). Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 70.

abilities.name: Kinetic Fence
abilities.description: After a short formation time, creates a wall-barrier of kinetic energy that slows enemy units down to the point where they cannot pass through it. Cast Range: 1200. Wall Length: 1200. Wall Width: 350. Damage per Second: 0. Duration: 4.4 (5.4). Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Cooldown: 14. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Static Storm
abilities.description: Creates a damaging static storm that also silences all enemy units in the area for the duration. The damage starts off weak, but gradually increases in power over the duration. Cast Range: 800. Effect Radius: 550 (625). Number of Intervals: 20. Max Damage per Second: 200/275/350 (260/335/410). Duration: 6. Aura Linger Duration: 0.033. Cooldown: 90/80/70. Mana Cost: 125/175/225.
